name: Metamorphosis: Animal
description: Transforms the caster into a normal animal. The caster uses the creature's physical stats and natural attacks.

effectProfiles.name: Wolf
effectProfiles.description: Transform into a wolf; use wolf natural attacks and movement.

formTransformation.notes: Caster is physically a wolf; intelligence and alignment remain unchanged.

effectProfiles.name: Black Bear
effectProfiles.description: Transform into a black bear; use bear natural attacks and movement.
